content: The heatwave occurred in January 2020, when Hopetoun, located in Western Australia, recorded its highest temperature of 50.7°C on January 19th, which was part of an extreme heatwave affecting Western Australia at that time.
raw_content: The heatwave occurred in January 2020, when Hopetoun, located in Western Australia, recorded its highest temperature of 50.7°C on January 19th, which was part of an extreme heatwave affecting Western Australia at that time.
